strings.tag: Hi [name], this is a test string from room001 - grissom's office.
I hope you're ready for your first case, rookie. A burned-out car was found in the desert—with a badly burned body inside. Nick's already on the scene.
Be sure to get your PDA and toolkit. The toolkit contains everything you need to process the scene.
Your gear is on my desk.
Find the crime scene icon under your LOCATIONS tab. When you get to the crime scene, talk to Nick before you start looking for evidence.
How do I get my PDA and my toolkit?
How do I get to the crime scene?
I'm ready to get my gear and head to the crime scene.
